_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibitors Lead to PDGFR Pathway Upregulation and Sensitize Tumors to RAF Dimer Inhibitors in NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor.

_contextSnippet: We observed an increase in the total PDGFRβ protein levels in M3 and the majority of MPNST cell lines following MEKi treatment
details: Showed increase in total PDGFRβ protein levels following MEK inhibitor treatment
